name: Gold Numemon (Ultimate)

signature_move.name: Gold-durianRush
signature_move.description: Continuously shoots gold poop at the enemy.

description: A subspecies of Numemon , its whole body is gold. It was born from a Numemon that discovered the Goldine Mine and took in its elements. Digimon Crusader ⇨ English ヌメモンの亜種で、全身が金色をしている。ゴルディーヌ鉱山を発見したヌメモンが、その成分を取り込んで誕生した。 デジモンクルセイダー ⇨ English Template:K ⇨ English Template:K ⇨ English Template:K ⇨ English Template:K ⇨ English Template:K
